meaning: n.荧光镜,荧光检查器vt.用荧光镜检查
examples: The physician typically uses an X-ray device called "fluoroscope".
The tension was checked at various angles of the hip joint and the motions of the abdominal arteries were monitored in 4 unembalmed cadavers using a C-arm fluoroscope.
"A video X-ray device called a" fluoroscope "helps guide the cannula to the medial branch nerves in your spine." These tiny nerves carry pain signals from your facet joints to your brain.
